result_required.description: result.json is the sole basis for completion confirmation.

output_refs_required.description: output_refs must point to completed formal files within result_scope + artifact_scope.

source_refs_required.description: source_refs must point to referenced input or context files.

atomic_write_required.description: result.json must be written to temp file first, then renamed. Half-written results not allowed.

verification_refs_required.description: Required for high-risk tasks in v0.2.
